question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/errors/errors.go -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Variable: ErrTransactionDecodeFailed] Can an unprivileged external user send a very large hex-encoded string to any construction endpoint, causing the hex.DecodeString call to allocate a large byte slice before returning ErrTransactionDecodeFailed, and by doing this at high frequency, exhaust heap memory and cause a DoS?
